billingconductor.billinggroup.accountgro: The set of accounts that will be under the billing group. The set of accounts resemble the linked accounts in a consolidated billing family.

billingconductor.billinggroup.accountgro.Description: Specifies if this billing group will automatically associate newly added AWS accounts that join your consolidated billing family.
The account IDs that make up the billing group. Account IDs must be a part of the consolidated billing family, and not associated with another billing group.
